description_long: This is a classic-style pink convertible car with a boxy, elongated body and a prominent front grille. The car features a large, slanted windshield, chrome side mirrors, and a thin, upright radio antenna on the passenger side. The interior is finished in a deep burgundy color, with visible front and rear bench seats and a simple dashboard layout. The wheels are silver with black tires, and the rear of the car is squared off with subtle tail lights and a chrome bumper. The overall design evokes mid-20th-century American luxury convertibles, with a playful, retro aesthetic. The car lacks a visible roof, emphasizing its open-top nature and suitability for leisurely urban drives.
description: A retro pink convertible car with a boxy body, chrome accents, and burgundy interior, featuring an open top and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, dual headlights, slanted windshield, and upright antenna.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, open cabin, chrome wheels, and visible interior seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared trunk, tail lights, chrome bumper, and the steering wheel on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the antenna and dashboard more visible.
